philippines.title: Regine Velasquez sets ‘final major solo concert’ in October after retirement hint
philippines.description:
Regine Velasquez has announced the dates for what she described as her “final major solo concert,” nearly two months after she hinted at her retirement from the entertainment industry.  In an Instagram post on Friday, May 1, Velasquez shared the poster of the show, stating that it is set for Oct. 17 and 18 at the SM Mall of Asia Arena. “F I N A L E. The final Major Solo Concert. Stay tuned for more details,” she captioned the post.  In the comments section, fellow celebrities including Gary Valenciano, Julie Anne San Jose, Jonalyn Viray, Iza Calzado, Darren Espanto, […]...
Keep on reading: Regine Velasquez sets ‘final major solo concert’ in October after retirement hint

philippines.title: Noel Kampton, Team Power rule Spikers’ Turf All-Star Showcase
philippines.description:
CANDON CITY — Noel Kampton and Team Power outshone Team Passion, 25-18, 25-18, 21-25, 25-23, in the Spikers’ Turf Volleyball All-Star Showcase on Friday at Candon City Arena. Led by Savouge coach Sydney Calderon and also bannered by five-time MVP Jude Garcia of Criss Cross, Team Power got the better of Team Passion, coached by Tai Bundit. READ: Spikers’ Turf: Players eager to adapt to new coaches in All-Star The exhibition match featured special rules, including two liberos playing at the same time and allowed to attack from the front line in the fourth set. Team Power’s libero Vince Lorenzo […]...
Keep on reading: Noel Kampton, Team Power rule Spikers’ Turf All-Star Showcase

philippines.title: SB19’s Stell dances ‘Baile’ with Rochelle Pangilinan at ‘Last rAWnd’ concert
philippines.description:
Stell Ajero of SB19 delighted fans with his surprise appearance at SexBomb Girls’ “Get, Get, Aw! The Last rAWnd!” concert, joining Rochelle Pangilinan on stage for her “Baile” performance. Ajero and Pangilinan delivered a standout performance with their trademark high-energy moves, as seen in the videos shared by SB19 on its official Instagram page on Thursday, April 30. Ajero donned a cowboy-inspired ensemble, while the actress-performer stunned in her summer-themed look. Netizens also cheered for the duo, sharing clips from the show via Instagram as well. READ: SexBomb Girls concert makes record with four-day sold-out shows After their concert performance, […]...
Keep on reading: SB19’s Stell dances ‘Baile’ with Rochelle Pangilinan at ‘Last rAWnd’ concert

energy.title: TotalEnergies Extends Fuel Price Cap in France as Middle East Crisis Drags On
energy.description: TotalEnergies will keep its fuel prices in France capped for as long as the Middle East crisis lasts, the French supermajor said, extending the policy first introduced two weeks into the conflict. TotalEnergies is capping the price of gasoline and diesel at its stations in France to protect consumers from the “exceptional market volatility” since the beginning of the war in the Middle East, the French energy major said in early March, when the conflict was not expected to last this long. Now the company will keep the fuel price cap…

energy.title: Oil Prices Set for Another Weekly Gain as Supply Shock Deepens
energy.description: Crude oil prices may have retreated from the highs reached on Thursday, but they are still set for a strong weekly gain. At the time of writing, Brent crude was trading at 112.10 per barrel, and West Texas Intermediate was trading at 106.30, with the gap between the two benchmarks shrinking once again. On Thursday, the final day of trading for June futures, Brent crude topped $126 for a brief period, remaining around $125 per barrel over the Thursday trading session. The Benchmark is now up more than 40% since the war broke out in late February.…

usStocks.title: Apple shares rise on strong quarterly sales in run-up to CEO change
usStocks.description: Apple shares jumped 3% in premarket trading on Friday after the iPhone maker posted its strongest quarterly sales growth in more than four years, a show ‌of momentum as it prepares to hand over the reins to a new CEO.  Its latest ‌iPhone 17 Pro series and the newly launched low-cost MacBook Neo laptop are both drawing buyers at a time of low ​overall demand in the consumer electronics industry due to price hikes forced by the memory chip shortage.  Even though Apple's margins for the January-March quarter and its fiscal third-quarter forecast were above Wall Street estimates, outgoing CEO Tim Cook warned that higher memory costs would increasingly weigh on the business from June.
usStocks.source: Yahoo! Finance: AAPL MSFT GOOGL AMZA NVDA News

usStocks.title: Big Tech Is Making ‘Empty Promises’ on 500 Gigawatts of Data Centers It Can’t Deliver
usStocks.description: Jigar Shah, the former head of the Department of Energy’s Loan Programs Office and co-founder of Generate Capital, used his recent Prof G Markets appearance with Ed Elson to throw cold water on one of the loudest narratives in tech investing. The claim under attack is that hyperscalers can actually build the data center capacity ... Big Tech Is Making ‘Empty Promises’ on 500 Gigawatts of Data Centers It Can’t Deliver
usStocks.source: Yahoo! Finance: AAPL MSFT GOOGL AMZA NVDA News
